description:
Features: 
- Human, Zora, and Deku forms
- Zora and Deku forms each include a unique effigy and shield
- Deku Saxophone w/ altered animation
- 2h grip animation adjustments
- Equipment Pack "Astoltian Weaponry" (ocarina, bow, swords 'n boards)
- All masks excluding Romani's, Circus Leader's, Kafei's, Couple's, and Giant's, have been changed

For use with Player Model Manager.
